Use this rule and define a percentage on the end retail price of the product as the commission amount. So for example, the parent account can define 70% of the end retail as their commission policy.

This is Partner rule. This retail price settlement rule is based on the end retail price of a product. Use this rule and define a percentage on the end retail price of the product as the settlement amount. So for example, the parent account can define 70% of the end retail as their settlement policy.

post.description:
This API is used to create resell template. This request shows the complete JSON request of the Create Resell Template REST API.

#### Data Parameters

You can see the details of each data parameter below.

| Parameters | Description | Default Value | Required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `templateName` \[string\] | This field is used to provide a name for the template which is being defined by the user. | None | Yes |
| `productIds` \[int\] | Provide the ids of the products in this field. The corresponding products will be added to the template. This field is conditionally required only if the bundle id is not passed. | None | Conditionally |
| `bundleIds` \[int\] | Provide the ids of the bundles in this field. The corresponding bundles will be added to the template. This field is conditionally required only if the product id is not passed. | None | Conditionally |

put.description:
This API is used to swap provisioning attributes from the source subscription to the destination subscription.

**Note**:

- Subscription should be billing active.
- Swap only within that party role level.
- At Least only value should be present in the source subscription.
- Quantity will decrease in source and increase in the destination subscription, based on the maximum number of values to swap.
- Not allowed to swap the duplicate values.
- Multiple attribute values can swap at the same time (Telephonenumber, phonenumber)
- It will support only multiple-based provisioning attributes.
